description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and large rectangular windows. The front facade includes a double garage with two cars, a prominent blue front door, and a set of stepping stones leading to the entrance. A single tree is positioned to the left of the entryway, adding a touch of greenery to the otherwise stark exterior. The upper floor is accessible via an interior staircase visible through the large windows, and the house layout suggests multiple rooms on both levels. The rear of the house features a balcony or terrace area with a wooden deck. The exterior is predominantly white with some black and wood accents, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, and minimalist white exterior accented by wood and black details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, blue door, double garage with two cars, large windows, and a tree to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's depth, the tree partially visible, and a wooden deck or balcony extending from the upper floor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large arched window/door, the wooden deck, and the staircase inside, with minimal exterior detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back and side walls, the tree on the right, and no visible windows or doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a blue door, a set of stepping stones, and no porch or overhang, with a minimalist, clean-lined appearance.
